titles.en: Reward of one who memorizes the Holy Quran and one who obeys its commandments

text: حَدَّثَنِی الْحُسَیْنُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ جَمِیلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: الْحَافِظُ لِلْقُرْآنِ وَ الْعَامِلُ بِهِ مَعَ السَّفَرَهِ الْکِرَامِ الْبَرَرَهِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by al-Hussain b. Ahmad from his father from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Jameel b. Salih from al-Fadhl b. Yasar from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “A person who memorizes the Holy Quran and obeys its commandments is in the group of senior angels.”
